security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* ipc: https://ipc.localhost; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'

bundle.longDescription: Xianxia Studio is a desktop application that automates the production of YouTube videos about Chinese mythology, xianxia, and wuxia, using 100% local AI processing.
